name: Python (New)
description: Multi-check test that measures the knowledge of python programming, database, modules and library.

name: Technology Professional 2.0 Job Focused Assessment
description: Job Focused Assessment assesses key behavioral attributes required for success in fast-paced roles.

name: General Cognitive Ability
description: Measures logical, numerical, and verbal reasoning to predict problem-solving performance.

name: Situational Judgement Test
description: Assesses judgement in realistic workplace scenarios to evaluate decision-making.

name: Java Programming Test
description: Evaluates core Java syntax, OOP, collections, exceptions, concurrency, and debugging.

name: SQL Querying Test
description: Assesses SQL proficiency across joins, subqueries, window functions, and optimization.

name: Communication Competency Assessment
description: Measures written and verbal communication, active listening, and stakeholder engagement.

name: Teamwork and Collaboration
description: Evaluates collaboration, conflict resolution, and cross-functional effectiveness.

name: Critical Thinking Test
description: Assesses analytical reasoning, inference, and evaluation of arguments.
